reasoning: Inspected both 4x (thumbnail, upper-left) and 8x (main sprite, right). Wings use more than 2-3 discrete blue tones; the light-to-dark transition reads as a smooth gradient rather than deliberate hard steps — classic AI shading tell. Outline weight is inconsistent: some silhouette edges are 1px clean outlines, others are 0px (missing) or bleed into adjacent hues, particularly around the lower torso and leaf cluster. Dithering in the dress/body area contains clusters that appear statistically noisy rather than manually placed — pixel placement does not follow a recognizable ordered or Bayer dither pattern, suggesting generative origin. Minor color bleed between the peach skin tones and the pink dress pixels in 3-4 transition zones. Flowers and overall composition are coherent with no semantic failures; macro edges are hard (no sub-pixel AA at the pixel-art scale). Sprite reads as AI-generated pixel art with post-processing cleanup — not clean hand-authored work, but not severely broken either.
